productDisplayName: Puma Men TX-3 Green Casual Shoes
description: These TX-3 lifestyle sneakers from puma are a perfect choice for urban wear. These shoes are great for regular wear since their attractive design looks super hot when teamed with jeans and tees for a cool casual look. Upper Combination of suede, fabric and mesh uppers for durability and structure Mesh forefoot uppers and tongue for better breathability Lace-ups for snug Fit Padded collar for greater comfort Leather lining for extra comfort Brand name appliqued on the tongue and cat logo embedded on the collar Appliqued formstripe panels on the sides Brand name sculpted on the plastic panel on the heel Midsole Cushioned insole for all day comfort Phylon midsole for lightweight design Outsole Rubber traction outsole with adapted waffle pattern Flex grooves for better flexibility of the feet
